task: Independent verification of HIGH/MED concerns from the DEEPEN batch audit

concerns_in_scope.summary: RF opportunity-cost is charged on 1 unit of capital while the vol-targeted position is ~2.9x levered and the borrow spread IS charged on the full levered notional. The full RF cost of carrying lev units of long spot (own-capital opp-cost + borrowed-cash interest) is lev*RF; the deepen excess branch charges only 1*RF, under-charging by (lev-1)*RF.

independent_reproduction.method: self-contained re-derivation from raw output/dated-futures/*_quarterly_basis.json, three financing models

audit_script_reproduction.note: dated_financing_leak_check.ts re-run reproduces its committed JSON exactly

smoking_gun_internal_contradiction.problem: Excess-of-RF return (12.61%) EXCEEDS absolute return (8.03%) by 4.58%/yr. This is economically impossible for a correctly-computed excess return (excess = absolute - benchmark <= absolute). It can only occur because the excess branch charges RF on 1 unit while the absolute branch charges RF on lev. The report's own two numbers prove the leak.

concerns_in_scope.corrected_verdict_it_should_be: Still PROMISING (verdict label unchanged), but headline economics ~2x lower: Sharpe ~0.7 (not 1.64), ~$450-475/mo (not ~$1051), DSR@honestN ~0.13-0.17 (FAIL). The deepen SUMMARY.md states exactly this; only the persisted dated_futures_carry_deepen_report.json still asserts the leaked PROMISING headline (verdict PROMISING, Sharpe 1.639, $1051/mo) with no mention of the correction.
concerns_in_scope.materiality: MEDIUM. The leak does NOT flip the scientific verdict: even the leaked artifact FAILS its binding gate deflatedSharpe_excess (dprob 0.719 < threshold) and Harvey-Liu (t 2.57 < 3.16), so it caps at PROMISING either way. The harm is a ~2x economics OVERSTATEMENT that survives only in the committed JSON; the SUMMARY narrative is correct.

skipped_low_severity.spot_check: reserve_honest_n_check.ts reproduces: prereg surrogate p=0.135 at N=1 deflates to ~1.0 across N=12 grid -> FAILS multiple testing -> correctly capped at PROMISING. Conservative; verdict unaffected. Skipped per HIGH/MED-only mandate, but confirmed not under-rated.

batch_trust: MINOR-ISSUES (agrees with the audit). The four scientific verdicts (donchian PROMISING, vrp KILL, dated downgraded-within-PROMISING, reserve PROMISING) are methodologically correct. The one material finding is a documentation/persistence gap: the dated financing-leak correction (a real ~2x economics overstatement) was applied only in SUMMARY prose while the committed result JSON still reports the leaked PROMISING headline.
